data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for substitution history tracking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Substitution history tracking' requirement. However, the provided evidence does not include any checks or data related to the tracking of substitution history. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature but does not provide concrete evidence that it is implemented or functioning in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence of substitution history tracking being implemented or verified.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for substitution history tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of substitution history tracking.
